name: Build NIXL Plugin from Source with conn_info_ Fix
description: Build NIXL LIBFABRIC plugin from littlemex/nixl main branch (includes Backend deletion fix)

tasks.name: Install build dependencies
tasks.skip_if: dpkg -l | grep -q build-essential && dpkg -l | grep -q cmake && dpkg -l | grep -q libfabric-dev && dpkg -l | grep -q libhwloc-dev
commands: sudo apt-get install -y build-essential cmake ninja-build git libfabric-dev libhwloc-dev

tasks.name: Verify conn_info_ fix is present
commands: grep -q 'conn_info_' ${NIXL_CLONE_DIR}/src/plugins/libfabric/libfabric_backend.h || (echo '[ERROR] conn_info_ fix not found' && exit 1)
echo '[OK] conn_info_ fix verified in source'

tasks.name: Build NIXL with LIBFABRIC plugin
commands: pip3 install meson ninja pybind11 cmake || echo '[WARN] Some dependencies may already be installed'
sudo apt-get install -y ninja-build cmake || echo '[WARN] ninja/cmake may already be installed'
echo '[INFO] Setting up CUDA and EFA environment...'

tasks.name: Replace NIXL package plugin with built version
commands: test -f $NIXL_PKG_DIR/_lib/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so && cp $NIXL_PKG_DIR/_lib/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so $NIXL_PKG_DIR/_lib/libplugin_LIBFABRIC.so.original && echo '[OK] Original plugin backed up' || echo '[WARN] Original plugin not found, skipping backup'
echo '[INFO] Copying built plugin to NIXL package...'

tasks.name: Verify NIXL with new plugin
commands: echo '[INFO] Verifying NIXL with new plugin...'

python3 -c 'from nixl._api import nixl_agent, nixl_agent_config; import uuid; cfg = nixl_agent_config(); agent = nixl_agent(str(uuid.uuid4()), cfg); print("Available plugins:", agent.get_plugin_list())'
